title: ilex sessiliflora var. genuina
intro: Ilex sessiliflora var. genuina, also known as the Chinese holly, is a plant species within the holly family (Aquifoliaceae) that is native to China. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Japanese herbalism, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex sessiliflora var. genuina are said to include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and relieving digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, while the berries are sometimes used to make wines and other beverages.
